cnv.name: cnv
cnv.note: fixed: pinned explicit subadapter colors (tumor=#e41a1c red, normal=#377eb8 blue). The multiwig source color is now assigned by post-filter index which had flipped them vs origin/main.

insertion.name: insertion
insertion.note: fixed: rehosted a 650KB slice of the HG002 PacBio Sequel 15kb BAM (1:55.70-55.71Mb, 70 reads) to s3://jbrowse.org/demos/hg002 so the PacBio track loads reliably (full remote NCBI BAM intermittently errored); Illumina track now shows soft clipping at the insertion. All three read tracks render the nstd175 insertion.

multisv.name: multisv
multisv.note: INVESTIGATED (inconclusive): the only branch diff found is LABEL_FONT_SIZE 11 (webgl-poc) vs 12 (main) in plugins/canvas/src/RenderFeatureDataRPC/constants.ts — a 1px change whose math actually predicts webgl-poc should be TIGHTER, so it does not clearly explain the looser packing. Changing it is a global per-track-app change, too risky to apply blindly for a screenshot. Needs maintainer decision.

breakpoint_split_view.name: breakpoint_split_view
breakpoint_split_view.note: fixed: reconstructed the old share session as a DECLARATIVE sessionSpec (loc-based BreakpointSplitView). Pileups shortened (alignments display height 140 via per-track displaySnapshot). Intra-view links turned off. To do this declaratively+typed, LaunchView-BreakpointSplitView now forwards ALL view-level snapshot props (typed via SnapshotIn<BreakpointViewStateModel> through the ExtensionPointRegistry) into addView, and BreakpointSplitViewInitView.tracks widened to accept {trackId,displaySnapshot} (source changes in plugins/breakpoint-split-view). Doc Live-demo link updated to the same session spec (was a different share). Rebuilt jbrowse-web; rendered+verified.

alignment_clipping_indicators.name: alignment_clipping_indicators
alignment_clipping_indicators.note: fixed: replaced the wide 28kb SKBR3 illumina view (tiny scattered ticks) with the volvox long-read SV BAM zoomed onto an SV breakpoint at ctgA:2560-2760. Reads clip hard at the breakpoint column, giving a tall unmistakable clip-indicator stack where coverage drops to zero, plus readable clip/insertion ticks above the coverage band.

insertion_indicators.note: resolved: deleted; alignments_track.md now uses insertion.png

inverted_duplication.name: inverted_duplication
